name: Lottery School Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: Possibly Gaston County Schools area (NC) - unconfirmed
recent_news: No public news found. Registered as a NC LLC in Gastonia; no website or contractor confirmation in Gaston County Schools materials.
fit_notes: Very small (~35 employees, ~$1.3M revenue) single-tier NC operator with no web presence; possibly a route subcontractor or activity-bus operator. Insufficient signal to confirm fit as a Summit tuck-in; would require direct outreach to verify operations.

name: Aksamit Trans Of Browerville
recent_news: Family-run since June 2000 when Mike & Jenny Aksamit took over the Browerville route from Jerry Zigan; expanded to multiple districts starting 2011; affiliated entity 'Aksamit Transportation of Browns Valley LLC' indicates continued expansion. No M&A news found.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: established family-owned MN operator with ~100-bus fleet, multi-district contracts, special-needs/early-childhood services, and 25+ year operating history. Founder-led (Mike/Jenny Aksamit) at 25-year mark suggests potential succession opportunity. Note: employee count of 31 in source data appears understated vs. ~100-bus fleet.

name: LPN Transportation LLC
recent_news: Formed June 2023 in Ontario, CA. FMCSA SAFER snapshot shows interstate for-hire property carrier (general freight) with 1 power unit and 1 driver - NOT a school bus operator.
fit_notes: NOT a fit - this is a 1-truck general freight carrier mis-tagged as school transport. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Riffey Buses
districts_or_customers: Likely Knox County Schools area (Corryton, TN)
recent_news: No public news, website, or coverage found. Knox County Schools uses many small private contractors (e.g., T&J, JLL Transport, Gentry/Olympus) on individual route contracts; Riffey appears to fit that pattern but is not specifically named in published Knox County materials.
fit_notes: Likely a small family-owned Knox County route contractor (TN uses many independent owner-operators). Too small to be a standalone platform but could be a regional roll-up component if Summit is consolidating Knox County route contractors; needs direct outreach to confirm fleet size and operating status.

name: Paris Academy Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: Small Houston-based LLC. FMCSA records show USDOT 3955624 with operating status reported as 'Not Authorized' in one source and 'Authorized for Property' (1 power unit, 1 driver) in another - indicates a single-truck property carrier, not a school bus operator.
fit_notes: NOT a fit - 1-unit Houston property carrier with no school bus operating authority or evidence of student transportation. Name 'Academy' is misleading. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline.
